case_title: COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, VS. DAVID MEMBRENO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION MICHAEL S. ROSSOFF FILED RE: CCP 585(4) AND LOSS OF ORIGINAL LEASE EVID CODE 1501, 1551 FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEMBRENO, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 684 ELLIS STREET, #713, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS SENT TO DAVID MEMBRENO RETURNED--NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED; UNABLE TO FORWARD
